title: AvailableModel
description: Per-installed-artifact DTO returned by GET /api/v1/extensions/nexus.local-llm/chat/available_models. Mirrors AvailableModelDto in extensions/builtin/local-llm/rust/src/chat/handlers.rs and AvailableModel in apps/web/src/services/local_llm_chat.ts. Spec 039 adds is_moe and expert_layer_count.

is_moe.description: True when the GGUF metadata indicates this is a Mixture-of-Experts model. Derived from <arch>.expert_count > 0 OR architecture-name match. Default false when extraction succeeded but no MoE indicator was found; the host row may store NULL but the wire surface is bool (NULL → false).

expert_layer_count.description: Number of transformer blocks containing MoE experts. NULL when is_moe is false OR when layer_count is also NULL. In practice equals layer_count for mainstream MoE GGUFs (Mixtral, GPT-OSS, Qwen3-MoE, DeepSeek-V2, DBRX). Frontend uses this as the upper bound of the --n-cpu-moe slider; falls back to 64 when null.
